sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114193" key="xloo/morfos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χλοό-μορφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114193.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like grass, greenish,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0579.tlg001:84:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">84.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
